title: sophora tomentosa var. occidentalis
intro: Sophora tomentosa var. occidentalis, also known as the pahanakai or Korean sophora, is a plant species in the legume family that is native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Sophora tomentosa var. occidentalis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and prevent the spread of certain diseases. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in traditional Korean medicine to treat a range of conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions.
